preloadTrial.messageText: Please wait while the experiment loads. This may take a few minutes.

game.text2: I am Luna the space cat.
game.text3: Ready to play a fun game?

stand.text2: In this activity, small pictures will appear briefly on the screen.
stand.text3: Then you will press the button that matches what you saw.

game.text2: They make pictures that look like flowers and cars!

stand.text2: Here is how the task will work.{{pause-medium}}

game.text1: Help me make a map of the sky!
game.text2: Then I can find my way to Earth and visit you.
We added the first piece to our map!
game.text3: Onwards!

stand.text2: Onwards!

game.text2: We will fly faster now.
game.text3: Each time, tell me what was above the blue line.

stand.text2: The pictures will flash faster now.
stand.text3: Each time, press the button with the picture that was above the blue line.

game.text2: Ready to fly even faster?
game.text3: Keep telling me what to add to our map.

stand.text2: Keep showing what was above the blue line.

game.text2: We landed on our first planet!
Spotting stars can get really hard, but do not worry.
game.text3: Just take your best guess!

stand.text2: Spotting pictures can get really hard, but do not worry.
stand.text3: Just take your best guess!

game.text2: The map is filling up!
game.text3: Keep going! {{pause-medium}}

stand.text2: Keep going! {{pause-medium}}

game.text2: Keep going! {{pause-medium}}

stand.text2: Keep going! {{pause-medium}}

game.text2: The map is almost ready!
game.text3: Keep going! {{pause-medium}}

stand.text2: You are almost done!
stand.text3: Keep going! {{pause-medium}}

game.text2: It will be tricky to see the stars.
game.text3: It is okay to guess if you are not sure, just try your best. {{pause-medium}}

stand.text2: It will be tricky to see the pictures.
stand.text3: It is okay to guess if you are not sure, just try your best. {{pause-medium}}

game.text2: We landed on another planet!
game.text3: The stars look different here.
game.text4: Rest for a moment if you like and press the spaceship to keep playing.

stand.text2: You are halfway done.
stand.text3: Rest for a moment if you like and press {{btn-start}}NEXT{{btn-end}} to go on.

stand.text2: The pictures will look different now, but your task stays the same.
stand.text3: Keep showing what was above the blue line.

game.text2: You showed me the way to Earth!
game.text3: Now I can visit you.
game.text4: Press the spaceship to finish the game.

stand.text2: You are all done!
stand.text3: Thank you so much for completing our activity.
stand.text4: Press {{btn-start}}NEXT{{btn-end}} to save your work and exit.

stand.text2: Awesome!

game.text2: Awesome!

stand.text2: You will get it next time!

game.text2: You will get it next time!

game.text: This is the cabin of my spaceship. Look straight at the mark so that we stay on course. The stars will appear on the screen.

stand.text: Look straight at the mark. The pictures will appear on the screen.

game.text: Here they are! It looks like a tree on the left

stand.text: Here they are! It looks like a tree on the left

game.text: and a flower on the right.

stand.text: and a flower on the right.

game.text: Try to remember what you see! The stars appear for just a moment as we zoom by. When they disappear, the line will show what we need for the map.

stand.text: Try to remember what you see! The pictures appear for just a moment. When they disappear, a line will appear under one of the spots.

game.text: Do you remember what was above the line? {{pause-long}}

stand.text: Do you remember what was above the line? {{pause-long}}

game.text: It looked like a flower, so press the flower button.

stand.text: It looked like a flower, so press the flower button.

game.text: Remember what you see. There are four pictures this time. They look like

stand.text: Remember what you see. There are four pictures this time. They look like

game.text: Do you remember what was above the blue line?{{pause-long}}

stand.text: Do you remember what was above the blue line?{{pause-long}}

game.text: It looked like a rabbit, so press the rabbit button.

stand.text: It looked like a rabbit, so press the rabbit button.

game.text: Press the picture that was above the blue line.

stand.text: Press the picture that was above the blue line.

stand.text2: In this activity, you will watch moving dots.
stand.text3: You will decide whether they move left or right.

game.text2: I am Beata the bee.
game.text3: Ready to play a fun game?

stand.text2: You can use the space bar on your keyboard instead of the {{btn-start}}NEXT{{btn-end}} button.
stand.text3: Press the space bar or {{btn-start}}NEXT{{btn-end}} to continue.

game.text2: My friends flew off and I could not keep up.
game.text3: Can you help me find which way they went?

stand.text2: You will use the arrow keys on your keyboard to indicate the direction of motion.
You are about to see moving dots.
stand.text3: Decide whether the motion is mostly left or right.

game.text2: My bee friends are about to zoom by!
game.text3: Will they fly to the flowers or the beehives?
game.text4: Press the binoculars to see them go.

stand.text2: You are about to see moving dots.
stand.text3: Decide whether the motion is mostly left or right.{{pause-medium}}

game.text2: My bee friends are about to zoom by!
game.text3: Will they fly to the flowers or the beehives?{{pause-medium}}

stand.text2: Watch the dots move again.

game.text2: Press the binoculars to see the bees fly by again.

stand.text2: Watch the dots move again.{{pause-medium}}

game.text2: Get ready to see the bees fly by again.{{pause-medium}}

stand.text2: Each time, watch carefully and decide the main direction of motion.
stand.text3: Then press the left or right arrow.{{pause-medium}}

game.text2: My friends will keep zooming around!
game.text3: Each time, watch carefully and show me which way they fly.{{pause-medium}}

stand.text1: Now try it on your own{{pause-medium}}

game.text2: Now I will stop talking and focus on flying!
game.text3: Keep telling me which way to go.{{pause-medium}}

game.text2: We filled the entire honeycomb with golden honey!
game.text3: If we fill one more, I will have enough honey for the whole winter!

stand.text2: If it feels hard sometimes, do not worry!
stand.text3: Just take your best guess!

game.text2: If it feels hard sometimes, do not worry!
game.text3: Just take your best guess!

stand.text2: Take a quick break if you like and press {{btn-start}}NEXT{{btn-end}} to continue.

game.text2: The second honeycomb is filling up!
game.text3: Take a quick break if you like and press the binoculars to keep playing.

stand.text2: You are almost there!
stand.text3: Rest for a moment if you like and press {{btn-start}}NEXT{{btn-end}} to go on.

game.text2: The honeycomb is almost full!
game.text3: Rest for a moment if you like and press the binoculars to go on.

stand.text2: You are all done!
stand.text3: Thank you so much for completing our activity.
stand.text4: Press {{btn-start}}NEXT{{btn-end}} to save your work and exit.

game.text2: Look at all the honey we have now!
game.text3: Thanks to you, I am ready for the winter!
game.text4: Press the binoculars to finish the game.

stand.text2: Remember to press the left arrow for left motion and right arrow for right motion.

game.text2: Remember to tell me which way to fly by pressing the buttons or the arrows!
Awesome!
You will get it next time!

stand.text2: Does your device have a physical keyboard?
Find the right arrow key on your keyboard.
stand.text3: Press it to continue.

stand.text2: Try again.
stand.text3: Press the right arrow key on your keyboard.

stand.text2: That is okay.
stand.text3: Press any key to continue.

stand.text2: Press any key to continue.
Now find the left arrow key on your keyboard.
stand.text3: Press it to continue.

stand.text2: Try again.
stand.text3: Press the left arrow key on your keyboard.

stand.text2: Press any key to continue.
You will use the on-screen buttons to indicate the direction of motion.
stand.text3: Press the left or right button to continue.

stand.text2: To indicate the direction of motion, use the arrows on your keyboard or on screen.
stand.text3: Press the left or right arrow to continue.

stand.text2: You can use the on-screen buttons instead of the keyboard.
stand.text3: Press the left or right button to continue.

stand.text2: The dots are mostly moving right, so press the right arrow!

game.text1: The bees are flying to the flowers, so press the flower button or the right arrow on your keyboard!

stand.text2: The dots are mostly moving left, so press the left arrow!

game.text1: The bees are flying to the beehives, so press the beehive button or the left arrow on your keyboard!

stand.text2: Press the left arrow for left motion and the right arrow for right motion.

game.text3: If the bees are flying to the flowers, press the flower button or the right arrow.
game.text4: If they are flying to the beehives, press the beehive button or the left arrow. {{pause-long}}
